description: Added sendWelcomeEmail that fires on every profile update
diff_summary: updateUserProfile now sends a welcome email after every profile update

edge_cases: Users receive welcome email every time they update their profile — spam regression; email sending failure now breaks profile updates (not isolated)
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Welcome email logic belongs in the signup/onboarding flow, not in updateUserProfile; side effect added to a generic update function
ground_truth.next_prompt: Users are getting welcome emails every time they save their profile settings
ground_truth.notes: Logic placed in wrong layer — welcome email should only fire on account creation
